articles.content: During his five-year LoP stint, Satheesan emerged as a formidable political figure by directly taking on CM Vijayan; he is also said to have played a key role in rejuvenating Congress at the grassroots.

articles.title: Ukraine court orders arrest of Zelenskyy ally Andriy Yermak

articles.title: Almost one-third of State IT projects over budget - PAC
articles.excerpt: Almost one-third of State IT projects commenced in the last two years have either gone over budget or are projected to do so.

articles.title: Burnham pulls out of BBC phone-in amid speculation
articles.excerpt: Burnham's spokesman says he has to "prioritise discussions arising from last week's elections".
articles.content: But Afzal Khan, the MP for Rusholme, and Withington's Geoff Smith, have both said the rumours concerning them stepping aside to spark a by-election, were false.
articles.author: BBC News

articles.excerpt: French authorities on Wednesday confined more than 1,700 passengers and crew, including hundreds of Brits, on the Ambition, operated by Ambassador Cruise Line.
